title: Sladefield Infant School: 29 February 2024
body: "Decision reference: VAR2394  Type of decision: variation to admission arrangements – The adjudicator approved the admission variation for Sladefield Infant School for September 2024.  Type of decision: variation to admission arrangements – Sladefield Infant School.  School type: community  School phase: primary  Local authority: Birmingham  Admission authority: local authority "
